items.definition_en: A store is a place where people buy things.
items.example_en: I went to the store for some bread.

items.definition_en: A customer is a person who buys something.
items.example_en: The customer paid for her coffee.

items.definition_en: A shop is a place where you can buy things.
items.example_en: There is a small shop on my street.

items.definition_en: A sale is a time when things are sold for less money.
items.example_en: The sale starts next week.

items.definition_en: A product is something that people sell or buy.
items.example_en: This product is very popular.

items.definition_en: A cashier is a person who takes your money in a shop.
items.example_en: The cashier gave me change.

items.definition_en: A price is the amount of money something costs.
items.example_en: The price of this book is low.

items.definition_en: A bag is something used to carry things you buy.
items.example_en: He put his apples in a bag.

items.definition_en: A receipt is a paper that shows what you bought.
items.example_en: I kept the receipt just in case.

items.definition_en: A counter is a table in a store where people pay.
items.example_en: She put the bread on the counter.

items.definition_en: A shelf is a board in a store used for holding things.
items.example_en: The cans are on the top shelf.

items.definition_en: A queue is a line of people waiting for something.
items.example_en: There is a long queue at the checkout.

items.definition_en: A discount is a lower price for something.
items.example_en: I got a discount on these shoes.

items.definition_en: A shopping cart is a thing with wheels for carrying things in a store.
items.example_en: He pushed the shopping cart down the aisle.

items.definition_en: A manager is a person who runs a store or a team.
items.example_en: The manager helped solve the problem.

items.definition_en: A basket is a container to carry things while shopping.
items.example_en: She carried a basket full of fruit.

items.definition_en: A checkout is the place where you pay in a shop.
items.example_en: I am waiting at the checkout.

items.definition_en: A clerk is a person who works in a store and helps customers.
items.example_en: The clerk showed me where the milk was.

items.definition_en: A brand is the name of a company or product.
items.example_en: This is my favorite brand of chocolate.

items.definition_en: An aisle is a long passage between shelves in a store.
items.example_en: The bread is in the third aisle.
